compiled_state.title: Update implementation-plan SKILL.md to load complexity-gate prompt in Proposal Generation
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE (RED test assertion created by Task 8307-3cd0; this task makes test_implementation_plan_references_complexity_gate pass)

## What to Change
In `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md`, locate the Proposal Generation section. Search for references to `approach-decision-maker`, `APPROACH_RESOLUTION`, or the proposal schema — this section is where multiple implementation proposals are generated before the approach-decision-maker evaluates them.

### 1. Add Read instruction at the start of Proposal Generation
```
Read `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md`. If the file cannot be read, STOP and emit:
"ERROR: complexity-gate.md not found at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md — create this file before running implementation-plan."
```

### 2. Apply YAGNI and Rule of Three gates to each proposal
At the task-planning level, only Gates 1 and 2 are checkable without external evidence:
- Gate 1 (YAGNI): Does this proposal add functionality not in the current story's done definitions?
- Gate 2 (Rule of Three): Does this proposal introduce an abstraction with fewer than 3 existing call sites?

If either gate returns FAIL, the proposal must either be revised (remove the offending complexity) or include a justified-complexity block (cite the exception from complexity-gate.md).

### 3. Apply Gate 3 when a proposal adds a new library
Gate 3 (Dependency Cost/Benefit) also applies at this level. When a proposal includes a new library dependency, include a GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT block for Gate 3 before the proposal is submitted to the approach-decision-maker.

## What NOT to Change
- The approach-decision-maker dispatch logic or APPROACH_RESOLUTION config handling
- The TDD Task Structure requirements
- The File Impact Enumeration step
- The proposal schema fields (additive-only)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md` contains a Read instruction for `shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md`
  Verify: `grep -q "shared/prompts/complexity-gate.md" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md`
- [ ] File contains hard-stop error emission for missing complexity-gate.md in Proposal Generation context
  Verify: `grep -q "complexity-gate.md" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && grep -qi "ERROR\|cannot be read\|not found" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md`
- [ ] YAGNI and Rule of Three gates are referenced in the Proposal Generation context
  Verify: `grep -qi "YAGNI\|Rule of Three" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md`
- [ ] test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh test_implementation_plan_references_complexity_gate section passes
  Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS.*implementation.plan|implementation.plan.*PASS"`
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes
  Verify: `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci`
